parent.name: Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf

zh.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau是Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf和N. von Querfurt的兒子，於1162年出生。他和NN至少有1個兒子。他去世於1227年享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau是Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf和N. von Querfurt的儿子，于1162年出生。他和NN至少有1个儿子。他去世于1227年享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Burgau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Gaetan, Luc, Aime, Amie, Andre, Armand, Dany, Fernand, Gaston, Gilles, Jean Louis.
French: from Old French, Old Occitan bureau, a diminutive of b(o)ure ‘frieze’ (see Burel ).
History: Louis Bureau dit Sansoucy from Saint-Jacques-de-Pirmel in Loire-Atlantique, Brittany (France), married Marie-Anne Gauvin in QC in 1685.

variants.name: Burel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri, Julienne, Patrice, Serge.

French: metonymic occupational name for a worker in the wool trade or perhaps a nickname for someone who habitually dressed in brown, from Old French burel, borel, a diminutive of b(o)ure ‘frieze’, a type of coarse reddish brown woolen cloth with long hairs (from Late Latin burra ‘coarse untreated wool’).

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau was born in 1162 as the son of Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf and N. von Querfurt. He had at least 1 son with NN. He died in 1227, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau est né en 1162, fils de Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf et N. von Querfurt. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec NN. Il est décédé en 1227, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau wurde 1162, als Sohn von Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf und N. von Querfurt geboren. Er hatte mit NN mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1227 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau è nato il nel 1162 come figlio di Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf e N. von Querfurt. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con NN. Morì nel 1227, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgauは1162年にOtto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim GrafとN. von Querfurtの息子として生まれた。彼はNNとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1227年に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau(은)는 1162년 Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf(와)과 N. von Querfurt의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 NN(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1227년 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau nasceu em 1162 filho de Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf e N. von Querfurt. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com NN. Ele faleceu em 1227, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau родился в 1162 г. Его родителей звали Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf и N. von Querfurt. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от NN. Он умер в 1227 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hermann IV von Lobdeburg- Burgau nació en 1162 como hijo de Otto von Lobdeburg von Alerheim Graf y N. von Querfurt. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con NN. Murió en 1227, a la edad de 65 años.
